title: Battle of LA: Lakers vs. Clippers
description: The Hallway Series returns to Crypto.com Arena. With both teams fighting for playoff positioning, this crosstown rivalry has real stakes heading into the stretch run.

title: USC vs. UCLA: Big Ten Basketball Showdown
description: The crosstown rivalry moves to the Galen Center for what could be a season-defining Big Ten matchup. Bragging rights and conference seeding on the line.

title: Lakers-Celtics: The NBA's Greatest Rivalry
description: Some rivalries never get old. Boston comes to LA for a Wednesday night primetime showdown that carries decades of history.

title: El Tráfico: Galaxy vs. LAFC
description: MLS's fiercest rivalry comes to Dignity Health Sports Park. The atmosphere at El Tráfico matches are electric — get there early.

title: Dodgers Opening Weekend at Chavez Ravine
description: Baseball is back in LA. The Dodgers host the Cubs for opening weekend at Dodger Stadium — nothing beats the energy of the first pitch of the season.

title: ELAC vs. Cerritos — JuCo Basketball Rivalry
description: South Coast Conference basketball at its best. East LA College hosts Cerritos in a heated rivalry game that's completely free to attend. Loud gyms, real passion, zero ticket cost.

title: Mt. SAC Early Season Track Invitational
description: Mt. SAC's Hilmer Lodge Stadium is legendary in the track world. This early-season invitational features community college athletes from across SoCal — and it's free.

title: Angel City FC Season Opener
description: The NWSL season kicks off at BMO Stadium. Angel City has built one of the most passionate fan bases in women's soccer — great atmosphere, accessible prices.

title: Basketball in Malibu: Pepperdine vs. LMU
description: Watch WCC basketball at Firestone Fieldhouse perched above the Pacific Ocean. Pepperdine vs. LMU is a solid local rivalry, and the ocean-view campus setting can't be beat.
